security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; connect-src http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:*; worker-src blob:

bundle.longDescription: Theridion Eyes — frontend automation desktop app with multi-framework support: Playwright (Chromium/Firefox/WebKit), Cypress, WebdriverIO, Selenium WebDriver. Built-in recorder (Playwright Codegen + selector picker). Visual regression baseline review, accessibility audit (axe-core), network interception, multi-browser run matrix.
